page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 128 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, the instance provides dedicated physical execution units without hyperthreading, ensuring predictable compute performance.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating systems and data persistence. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput inter-node communication.

Given its high core count and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.c7.32xlarge offers a high-density compute profile. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local NVMe storage. It is suitable for high-performance computing, intensive batch processing, web serving at scale, and parallelized CPU-bound compilation tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs on 128 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor on the x86_64 architecture, this instance provides a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading. It is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, offering 2.0 GB of memory per core, and features a 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, making it reliant on network-attached storage. This hardware profile is designed for compute-heavy workloads, such as high-performance computing, large-scale web serving, and parallel batch processing, where dedicated CPU performance and high network throughput are prioritized over local storage or high memory-to-CPU ratios.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-performance computing and parallel batch workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 128-core compute-optimized instance with high-speed networking for parallelized, CPU-intensive workloads requiring dedicated physical execution units.
